{{Infobox starship
| name = Bastion's Shadow
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

''See also: [[Bastion's Shadow Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]]'s [[Shadow]] is a large [[Navigator’s Vessel]] utilized by the [[Consultants]]. Constructed from seamless black wood, the ship is significantly larger than [[Calder Marten]]’s vessel, [[The Testament]]. A prominent feature of the ship is a massive [[Elder eye]] located at the top of its mast, which serves as a crow's nest and can swivel to scan the surroundings. The vessel is capable of navigating the [[Aion]] with the same proficiency as a [[Navigator]] and has been used to transport the remnants of the [[Consultant]]’s [[Guild]]. During its travels, the ship has demonstrated high levels of maneuverability, navigating through fields of gravity-defying masonry and debris at high speeds.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Bastion]]’s [[Shadow]] is a ship with a closed eye on top of its mast.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Bastion's Shadow]] is a location with a beach.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Bastion]]’s [[Shadow]] is a ship that can sail through [[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Heart]] affected the [[Consultants]] on [[Bastion's Shadow]] after two days of exposure.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Bastion's Shadow]] is something that has been prepared to hold [[Guild]] members.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Bastion's Shadow]] is a hold used for retreat.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Bastion]]’s [[Shadow]] is a ship sailing behind others in the fleet.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]]’s [[Shadow]] is a [[Consultant]] ship.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]]’s [[Shadow]] is a ship.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]]’s [[Shadow]] has a captain.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
